nodes.name: RoomReadPosBackup.java
nodes.summary: Redis-backed store for per-user last-read message positions per room, with TTL refresh and a write-behind dirty-tracking mechanism so updates can be flushed to the database asynchronously.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a Redis hash keyed by room id plus a separate 'dirty' hash to batch-flush updated read positions to the database, avoiding a write on every read-position update.

nodes.name: RoomReadPosBackup
nodes.summary: Manages read-position values in Redis with TTL refresh, conditional update-if-greater semantics, and dirty-flag tracking for deferred database persistence.

nodes.name: refreshReadPositionTtlIfNeeded
nodes.summary: Refreshes the TTL of a read-position Redis key if its remaining time-to-live has dropped below the refresh threshold.

nodes.name: getLastReadMessageId
nodes.summary: Reads a user's last-read message id for a room from Redis, refreshing the key's TTL on access.

nodes.name: putLastReadMessageId
nodes.summary: Writes a user's last-read message id for a room into Redis and refreshes the key's TTL.

nodes.name: updateIfGreater
nodes.summary: Updates a user's read position only if the new message id is greater than the current one (loading from the database via dbLoader when uncached), marking it dirty for later persistence.

nodes.name: markDirty
nodes.summary: Flags a user's read position for a room as dirty so a background job can persist it to the database.

nodes.name: removeReadPosition
nodes.summary: Removes a user's cached read position for a room from Redis.

nodes.name: ReadPositionUpdateResult.java
nodes.summary: Small result record returned by read-position update operations, indicating the previous/new position values.

nodes.name: RoomMemberCache.java
nodes.summary: Redis-backed cache of active room membership (user ids per room) used to avoid repeated database lookups when determining who is in a chat room, with TTL refresh and fallback DB loading.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a Redis set per room id, with a get-or-load pattern to lazily populate the cache from the database on a miss.

nodes.name: RoomMemberCache
nodes.summary: Maintains the set of active member user ids per chat room in Redis, supporting initialization, incremental add/remove, counting, and get-or-load-from-database semantics.

nodes.name: refreshRoomMembersTtlIfNeeded
nodes.summary: Refreshes the TTL of a room-members Redis key if its remaining time-to-live has dropped below the refresh threshold.

nodes.name: initOrReplaceRoomMembers
nodes.summary: Initializes or completely replaces the cached member set for a room with the given user ids.

nodes.name: getRoomMembers
nodes.summary: Returns the cached set of member user ids for a room, refreshing the cache TTL on access.

nodes.name: getOrLoadRoomMembers
nodes.summary: Returns the cached room member set, falling back to a database loader and repopulating the cache when the cache is empty or missing.

nodes.name: countRoomMembers
nodes.summary: Returns the number of cached member user ids for a room.

nodes.name: addRoomMembers
nodes.summary: Adds one or more user ids to the cached member set for a room.

nodes.name: removeRoomMember
nodes.summary: Removes a single user id from the cached member set for a room.

nodes.name: WsGateChatClient.java
nodes.summary: Client-facing interface used by the websocket gateway to invoke chat commands (start direct/group chat, create/read/delete/react message) on the channel-engine service, implemented over gRPC by WsGateChatClientGrpc.

nodes.name: WsGateChatClient
nodes.summary: Interface declaring the chat commands the websocket-gateway can request from the channel-engine service (start direct/group chat, create/read/delete/react message).

nodes.name: PayloadDeleteChatMessageRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for a delete-chat-message request, carrying the room id and message id.

nodes.name: PayloadReactChatMessageRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for a react-chat-message request, carrying room/message ids, reaction type/code and whether the reaction should be added or removed.

nodes.name: PayloadReactChatMessageRequestDTO
nodes.summary: Inbound websocket payload representing a client request to react to (or un-react from) a chat message.

nodes.name: PayloadReadChatMessageRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for a read-chat-message request, carrying the room id and last read message id.

nodes.name: PayloadSendChatMessageRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for sending a chat message, carrying room id, message type/text, reply target and attachment ids.

nodes.name: PayloadSendChatMessageRequestDTO
nodes.summary: Inbound websocket payload representing a client request to send a chat message in a room.

nodes.name: PayloadStartDirectChatRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for starting a direct chat, carrying the target user's public id and first message content.

nodes.name: PayloadStartDirectChatRequestDTO
nodes.summary: Inbound websocket payload representing a client request to start a direct chat with a target user.

nodes.name: PayloadStartGroupChatRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO for starting a group chat, carrying room name/thumbnail, invited member ids and first message content.

nodes.name: PayloadStartGroupChatRequestDTO
nodes.summary: Inbound websocket payload representing a client request to start a group chat with invited members.

nodes.name: PayloadTypingRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket inbound payload DTO signaling that a user is typing in a room, carrying just the room id.

nodes.name: PayloadTypingResponseDTO.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket outbound payload DTO broadcasting that a user is typing, carrying room id, public id and nickname.

nodes.name: WsGateChatClientGrpc.java
nodes.summary: gRPC client implementation of WsGateChatClient that translates chat commands into gRPC requests against channel-engine's chat service stub and converts gRPC responses back to DTOs.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses chained protobuf Builder pattern to construct gRPC request messages and delegates response mapping to GrpcToDtoConverter.

nodes.name: WsGateChatClientGrpc
nodes.summary: Implements WsGateChatClient over gRPC, building requests from commands and converting channel-engine's gRPC responses back into DTOs via GrpcToDtoConverter.

nodes.name: startDirectChat
nodes.summary: Builds a StartDirectChatRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response back to a StartChatResponseDTO.

nodes.name: startGroupChat
nodes.summary: Builds a StartGroupChatRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response back to a StartChatResponseDTO.

nodes.name: createChatMessage
nodes.summary: Builds a CreateChatMessageRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response into a ChatMessageViewResponseDTO.

nodes.name: readChatMessage
nodes.summary: Builds a ReadChatMessageRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response into a ReadPositionUpdateResponseDTO.

nodes.name: deleteChatMessage
nodes.summary: Builds a DeleteChatMessageRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response into a DeleteChatMessageResponseDTO.

nodes.name: reactChatMessage
nodes.summary: Builds a ReactChatMessageRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine stub, and converts the response into a ReactChatMessageEventResponseDTO.

nodes.name: WsGateChatHandler.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket message handler for chat events: typing indicators, starting direct/group chats, sending/reading/deleting/reacting to messages, and pushing chat notifications, coordinating auth, session registry, and the chat gRPC client.
nodes.languageNotes: Bridges the stateful websocket session layer (WsGateSessionRegistry, WsGateOutboundWriter) with the stateless gRPC-backed chat client, and fans out push notifications to users not currently viewing the room.

nodes.name: WsGateChatHandler
nodes.summary: Handles all inbound websocket chat events for a session, invoking WsGateChatClient for chat operations and using WsGateOutboundWriter/WsGateSessionRegistry to broadcast results and notifications.

nodes.name: notificationPreviewText
nodes.summary: Builds a short preview text for a chat message notification, defaulting to the message type label when there is no text content.

nodes.name: pushChatMessageNotification
nodes.summary: Pushes a chat message notification to target users who are not currently viewing the room, building a ChatMessageNotificationDTO and delegating delivery to the outbound writer.

nodes.name: handleTyping
nodes.summary: Handles a typing-indicator websocket event, broadcasting a typing start/stop notification to other users viewing the room.

nodes.name: handleStartDirectChat
nodes.summary: Handles a start-direct-chat websocket event by invoking WsGateChatClient, enrolling the session in the new room, and responding to the requester.

nodes.name: handleStartGroupChat
nodes.summary: Handles a start-group-chat websocket event by invoking WsGateChatClient, enrolling the session in the new room, and responding to the requester.

nodes.name: handleSendMessage
nodes.summary: Handles a send-chat-message websocket event, invoking WsGateChatClient to persist the message, broadcasting it to the room, and pushing notifications to offline/other members.

nodes.name: handleReadMessage
nodes.summary: Handles a read-chat-message websocket event, invoking WsGateChatClient to update the read position and broadcasting the update to the room.

nodes.name: handleDeleteMessage
nodes.summary: Handles a delete-chat-message websocket event, invoking WsGateChatClient to delete the message and broadcasting the deletion to the room.

nodes.name: handleReactMessage
nodes.summary: Handles a react-chat-message websocket event, invoking WsGateChatClient to add/remove the reaction and broadcasting the reaction event to the room.
